name: Concordant Curators
description: The seven-spoke archive's keepers. Hold the official record of cross-world resonances, dome incidents, and faction treaties. Neutral by charter, networked by necessity.

name: Concordant Watch
description: The hub's civilian guard. Patrols the wards, brokers between merchants and crowd, and maintains the southern-arc field check. Accountable to the Assembly.

name: Bazaar Consortium
description: The merchant guild that arbitrates trade disputes in the Concordant Bazaar. Pragmatic, networked, occasionally entangled with off-ledger fences.

name: Refusal Keep
description: Tenders of the Refusal Field. Glyph-scholars, dome-walkers, and oracles. The Keep holds the field's anchor-readings and grants spell-mintings.

name: Concordant Assembly
description: The hub's deliberative body. Elected, term-limited, slow by design. Speaker convenes, but power lies in the seven seats.
